beefs.title: Tall Tales of the Wee Folk
Maurice Spata
beefs.about: Maurice or Murich is translated into Albanian as Murik, because the letter C, or the combination ch, is rendered as the letter K, and not as Q, as you translated it. For this reason, we attempted to correct this unprofessional spelling, which may also reflect certain tendencies. Furthermore, surnames such as Balṣ̌ić are in the Serbian language, whereas in the Albanian language, as this tribe is also known, it is Balsha.
quotes: Maurice or Murich is translated into Albanian as Murik, because the letter C, or the combination ch, is rendered as the letter K, and not as Q, as you translated it. For this reason, we attempted to correct this unprofessional spelling, which may also reflect certain tendencies. Furthermore, surnames such as Balṣ̌ić are in the Serbian language, whereas in the Albanian language, as this tribe is also known, it is Balsha.
Interceptor: Reverting unsourced content added by ~2026-38889-77
